examples.en: I need to see a doctor about my cough.
examples.zh: 我需要看醫生看我的咳嗽。

examples.en: The doctor told me to rest for a few days.
examples.zh: 醫生叫我休息幾天。

examples.en: The nurse gave me a shot in my arm.
examples.zh: 護士在我手臂上打了一針。

examples.en: A kind nurse helped me fill out the form.
examples.zh: 一位親切的護士幫我填表格。

examples.en: My grandma is in the hospital right now.
examples.zh: 我奶奶現在在醫院裡。

examples.en: The hospital is just around the corner.
examples.zh: 醫院就在轉角處。

examples.en: I feel sick, so I'm staying home today.
examples.zh: 我覺得不舒服,所以今天待在家。

examples.en: She was sick all last week.
examples.zh: 她上週整週都生病。

examples.en: I have a bad headache this morning.
examples.zh: 今天早上我頭痛得厲害。

examples.en: Too much screen time gives me a headache.
examples.zh: 看螢幕太久會讓我頭痛。

examples.en: The baby has a fever, so we called the doctor.
examples.zh: 寶寶發燒了,所以我們打電話給醫生。

examples.en: My fever finally went down last night.
examples.zh: 我的燒昨晚終於退了。

examples.en: I can't stop coughing at night.
examples.zh: 我晚上咳個不停。

examples.en: Cover your mouth when you cough.
examples.zh: 咳嗽時請摀住嘴巴。

examples.en: I caught a cold over the weekend.
examples.zh: 我週末感冒了。

examples.en: Drink some hot water for your cold.
examples.zh: 感冒喝點熱水吧。

examples.en: Take this medicine after every meal.
examples.zh: 每餐飯後吃這個藥。

examples.en: The medicine made me feel sleepy.
examples.zh: 這個藥讓我覺得想睡。

examples.en: I feel a sharp pain in my knee.
examples.zh: 我膝蓋感到一陣刺痛。

examples.en: The pain went away after I rested.
examples.zh: 我休息後疼痛就消失了。

examples.en: I'm so tired after a long day at work.
examples.zh: 上了一整天班後我好累。

examples.en: You look tired; you should get some sleep.
examples.zh: 你看起來很累,該去睡覺了。

examples.en: Eating vegetables keeps you healthy.
examples.zh: 吃蔬菜能讓你保持健康。

examples.en: He stays healthy by walking every day.
examples.zh: 他每天走路保持健康。

examples.en: I hurt my arm playing basketball.
examples.zh: 我打籃球時弄傷了手臂。

examples.en: She raised her arm to ask a question.
examples.zh: 她舉起手臂要問問題。

examples.en: My legs feel sore after running.
examples.zh: 跑步後我的腿很痠。

examples.en: He broke his leg in a car accident.
examples.zh: 他在車禍中摔斷了腿。

examples.en: My stomach hurts after eating too fast.
examples.zh: 我吃太快後肚子痛。

examples.en: Don't exercise on an empty stomach.
examples.zh: 別空腹運動。

examples.en: You should rest when you feel sick.
examples.zh: 你不舒服時應該休息。

examples.en: A good rest will help you recover.
examples.zh: 好好休息能幫你康復。

examples.en: I go to the dentist twice a year.
examples.zh: 我一年看兩次牙醫。

examples.en: The dentist said I have a cavity.
examples.zh: 牙醫說我有一顆蛀牙。

examples.en: A runny nose is a common cold symptom.
examples.zh: 流鼻水是常見的感冒症狀。

examples.en: Tell the doctor about all your symptoms.
examples.zh: 把你所有症狀告訴醫生。

examples.en: I have a sore throat and can barely talk.
examples.zh: 我喉嚨痛,幾乎沒辦法說話。

examples.en: Warm tea helps with a sore throat.
examples.zh: 溫茶對喉嚨痛有幫助。

examples.en: My runny nose won't stop today.
examples.zh: 我今天流鼻水停不下來。

examples.en: A runny nose usually means a cold.
examples.zh: 流鼻水通常代表感冒了。

img: person with tissue and runny nose

examples.en: The doctor wrote me a prescription for antibiotics.
examples.zh: 醫生開了抗生素處方給我。

examples.en: You can pick up your prescription at the pharmacy.
examples.zh: 你可以到藥局領處方藥。

examples.en: There's a pharmacy across the street.
examples.zh: 對街有一間藥局。

examples.en: I bought cough syrup at the pharmacy.
examples.zh: 我在藥局買了咳嗽糖漿。

examples.en: I made an appointment with the doctor for Monday.
examples.zh: 我跟醫生約了週一看診。

examples.en: Please don't be late for your appointment.
examples.zh: 請不要錯過你的約診時間。

examples.en: He returned to work after his injury healed.
examples.zh: 他的傷好了之後就回去上班。

examples.en: Wear a helmet to prevent head injuries.
examples.zh: 戴安全帽以防止頭部受傷。

examples.en: The nurse checked my blood pressure first.
examples.zh: 護士先幫我量了血壓。

examples.en: High blood pressure runs in my family.
examples.zh: 我家族有高血壓遺傳。

examples.en: I have an allergy to peanuts.
examples.zh: 我對花生過敏。

examples.en: Her allergy gets worse in spring.
examples.zh: 她的過敏在春天會加重。

examples.en: Take one pill with a glass of water.
examples.zh: 配一杯水吃一顆藥丸。

examples.en: I forgot to take my pills this morning.
examples.zh: 我今天早上忘了吃藥丸。

examples.en: I felt dizzy after standing up too fast.
examples.zh: 我站太快後覺得頭暈。

examples.en: She got dizzy on the roller coaster.
examples.zh: 她在雲霄飛車上覺得頭暈。

examples.en: He felt so sick that he had to vomit.
examples.zh: 他不舒服到吐了出來。

examples.en: If you keep vomiting, see a doctor.
examples.zh: 如果你一直吐,就去看醫生。

examples.en: Clean the wound before you put on a bandage.
examples.zh: 貼繃帶前先清洗傷口。

examples.en: The wound is healing nicely now.
examples.zh: 傷口現在復原得很好。

examples.en: I put a bandage on my cut finger.
examples.zh: 我在割傷的手指上貼了OK繃。

examples.en: Change the bandage twice a day.
examples.zh: 一天換兩次繃帶。

examples.en: I exercise for thirty minutes every morning.
examples.zh: 我每天早上運動三十分鐘。

examples.en: Regular exercise keeps your heart strong.
examples.zh: 規律運動能讓心臟強健。

examples.en: I go for a check-up once a year.
examples.zh: 我一年做一次健康檢查。

examples.en: The check-up showed everything was normal.
examples.zh: 健康檢查顯示一切正常。

examples.en: It took a week to recover from the flu.
examples.zh: 我花了一週從流感中康復。

examples.en: She is recovering well after surgery.
examples.zh: 她手術後恢復得很好。

examples.en: A balanced diet is good for your health.
examples.zh: 均衡的飲食對健康有益。

examples.en: She is on a low-sugar diet.
examples.zh: 她正在進行低糖飲食。

examples.en: I take a vitamin every morning with breakfast.
examples.zh: 我每天早餐配維他命吃。

examples.en: Oranges are full of vitamin C.
examples.zh: 柳橙富含維他命C。

examples.en: Half the office is out with the flu.
examples.zh: 辦公室一半的人都得流感請假了。

examples.en: Get a flu shot before winter.
examples.zh: 冬天前去打流感疫苗。

img: person sick with flu in bed

examples.en: We rushed him to the emergency room at midnight.
examples.zh: 我們半夜把他緊急送到急診室。

examples.en: The emergency room was crowded last night.
examples.zh: 昨晚急診室很擁擠。

examples.en: He needs surgery on his shoulder next week.
examples.zh: 他下週肩膀需要動手術。

examples.en: The surgery went well and took two hours.
examples.zh: 手術很順利,花了兩個小時。

examples.en: The doctor diagnosed her with the flu.
examples.zh: 醫生診斷她得了流感。

examples.en: It can be hard to diagnose the cause of the pain.
examples.zh: 要診斷疼痛的原因可能很困難。

examples.en: The doctor gave me antibiotics for the infection.
examples.zh: 醫生開了抗生素治療我的感染。

examples.en: Finish all your antibiotics even if you feel better.
examples.zh: 即使好轉也要把抗生素吃完。

examples.en: The cut got an infection and turned red.
examples.zh: 傷口感染了,變得紅腫。

examples.en: Wash your hands to avoid infection.
examples.zh: 洗手以避免感染。

examples.en: The vaccine protects you from the disease.
examples.zh: 疫苗能保護你免於這種疾病。

examples.en: Children get several vaccines when they are young.
examples.zh: 孩子在小時候會接種好幾種疫苗。

examples.en: The doctor ordered a blood test to check my sugar.
examples.zh: 醫生安排驗血檢查我的血糖。

examples.en: You should fast before the blood test.
examples.zh: 驗血前你應該要禁食。

examples.en: He suffers from chronic back pain.
examples.zh: 他有慢性背痛。

examples.en: Chronic diseases need long-term care.
examples.zh: 慢性疾病需要長期照護。

examples.en: Sleep helps strengthen your immune system.
examples.zh: 睡眠有助於增強免疫系統。

examples.en: A weak immune system makes you get sick easily.
examples.zh: 免疫系統弱容易生病。

examples.en: She goes to physical therapy after her knee surgery.
examples.zh: 她膝蓋手術後去做物理治療。

examples.en: Physical therapy helped me walk again.
examples.zh: 物理治療幫助我重新走路。

examples.en: One side effect of this medicine is drowsiness.
examples.zh: 這種藥的一個副作用是嗜睡。

examples.en: Ask your doctor about possible side effects.
examples.zh: 向醫生詢問可能的副作用。

examples.en: It took me two weeks to get over the flu.
examples.zh: 我花了兩週才從流感中康復。

examples.en: She's finally getting over her cold.
examples.zh: 她的感冒終於快好了。
